headline: James tightens the grip — +6 stretches the lead to 40.0.
sub: James leads on 40.0, 7 clear of Rob. The day belonged to James (+6), fueled by Egypt knocking out James's Australia in the Round of 32. Rob (+2) and Nick (+2) also climbed. Out of the tournament: Australia (James), Cape Verde (Rob), Ghana (Joe). Stev (14.0) has ground to make up.
